title: Foundry-Discord Bridge
description: Bridges Foundry VTT chat with a Discord channel in real-time

settings.name: Bridge WebSocket URL
settings.hint: WebSocket URL of the bridge server for receiving Discord messages (e.g., ws://your-vps:3120/foundry-bridge)

settings.name: Discord Webhook URL
settings.hint: Discord webhook URL for sending Foundry messages to Discord

settings.name: Enable Bridge
settings.hint: Connect to the Discord bridge and relay chat messages

settings.name: Show Discord Messages
settings.hint: Display incoming Discord messages in the Foundry chat

settings.name: Send to Discord
settings.hint: Forward Foundry chat messages to Discord
